ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who authored the review */,
  "review_body" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the review */,
  "rating_max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum possible rating value */,
  "review_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the review */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the review was created */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs for images attached to the review */,
  "review_url" TEXT /* Link to the online review */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  "original_text" TEXT /* Original text of the review for reference */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility or service being reviewed */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Count of reviews for the facility */,
  "aggregate_rating" REAL /* Aggregated rating for the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility or service being reviewed */,
  "place_id" TEXT /* Google place ID for mapping */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the review is anonymous */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the review is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility within the campus */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the facility */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the facility (e.g., academic, recreational) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the facility (e.g., library, gym) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review it belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being responded to */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member responding */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Content of the response */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the response was created */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., administrator, academic) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregate_ratings" (
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregate rating entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility for which the average rating is calculated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the facility */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the facility */,
  "rating_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ratings (e.g., 5-star, 4-star, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregate_ratings_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility for which statistics are recorded */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total count of reviews */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating calculated from reviews */,
  "five_star_count" INTEGER /* Count of five-star reviews */,
  "four_star_count" INTEGER /* Count of four-star reviews */,
  "three_star_count" INTEGER /* Count of three-star reviews */,
  "two_star_count" INTEGER /* Count of two-star reviews */,
  "one_star_count" INTEGER /* Count of one-star reviews */,
  "rating_trend" TEXT /* Trend of ratings over time (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_statistics_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tags_map" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "tag_id")
)
